title: Prime Minister

result_summary.note: Active + embarked only. Reserves are not observable.
default memberships not yet populated in template

final_assessment:
Based on my assessment of Levantia's military situation, here are my **3 TOP MILITARY PRIORITIES** for Q1 2026:

## Priority 1: Activate Multi-Layered Air Defense Against Persian Missile Threat
**WHY:** Persia has 15 observable units including 6 tactical air and dispersed forces across multiple hexes (6,12), (7,13), and (8,13), indicating a significant air/missile threat capability. Our current air defense has Iron Dome and David's Sling active but Arrow southern defense (lev_d_03) remains in reserve while we face an active war.  
**ACTION:** Activate lev_d_03 (Arrow southern) from reserve to active status at hex (6,10) to create overlapping air defense coverage against Persian ballistic missiles and long-range strikes.

## Priority 2: Mobilize Reserve Ground Forces for Multi-Front Defense
**WHY:** We have 3 ground units active on northern/southern fronts but 3 critical reserve units (lev_g_04 West Bank, lev_g_05 Northern home defense, lev_g_06 Southern Persia-facing) remain uncommitted. Persia has 8 observable ground units across multiple axes, requiring depth and redundancy in our defensive posture.  
**ACTION:** Activate lev_g_06 (Southern Persia-facing) to hex (6,10) and position lev_g_05 (Northern home defense) to active status to strengthen our defensive lines against potential Persian ground advances.

## Priority 3: Maintain Strategic Deterrent Readiness  
**WHY:** With only lev_m_01 active and two strategic missile units (lev_m_02, lev_m_03) in reserve, our nuclear deterrent appears under-committed given our war status with Persia. Our nuclear level 1 capability requires credible deployment to deter Persian escalation.  
**ACTION:** Activate lev_m_02 from reserve to ensure redundant strategic strike capability while keeping lev_m_03 as strategic reserve for second-strike assurance.

**Overall Strategic Intent:** Transition from peacetime reserve posture to active wartime defensive layering with credible deterrent visibility against Persian multi-domain threat.
